title: A Quiet Place: Day One Achieves Major Box Office Milestones
text: The horror prequel has simultaneously crossed two significant financial benchmarks. During its third weekend in theaters, the film surpassed $100 million at the international box office, which pushed its worldwide total past $200 million. The movie opened strongly with $52.2 million domestically, the best debut in the franchise's history. It reached the $100 million domestic mark by the end of its second week. According to the article, only 10 films from 2024 had achieved the $200 million worldwide milestone, with this film ranking ninth. Despite this success, Day One remains the lowest-grossing entry in the series: Original (2018) $340.9 million worldwide, Part II (2021) $297.3 million worldwide, and Day One (2024) ~$215.9 million worldwide. However, the prequel is gaining ground rapidly and could potentially overtake Part II before its theatrical run concludes. With a production budget of $67 million, the film is performing solidly against its investment.
